---
title: "London AI job report"
date: 2026-05-03
description: ""
image: ""
twitter-card:
  image: ""
open-graph:
  image: ""
categories:
  - social science
  - Organisation design
  - AI
  - London
resources:
  - "img/*"
doi: ""
citation: true
draft: true
---

Let's explore this report.



London’s workforce exposure to generative artificial intelligence
